title: CAMPS - 211info
text: YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides youth camps, including both overnight and day camps. Day camp locations are offered at multiple sites throughout the community. 685 Court Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Most activities for ages 1st grade-10th grade Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 399-2788 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 581-9622 Main phone Intake (503) 399-2788 Youth Development Felicia Fisher [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service, scholarships available. DOCUMENTS: If applying for scholarships: current pay stubs, copies of most recent tax returns, documentation of any other form of income (SSI/SSD, public assistance, unemployment, etc.) AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 5am-9:30pm, Saturday 7am-7pm, Sunday 1pm-6:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: On the corner of Cottage Street and Court Street in downtown Salem. Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - COURT CARE DROP IN CHILD CARE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - COMMUNITY RECREATION CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YMCA OF MARION AND POLK COUNTIES
